title: Swiggy Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Swiggy Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Swiggy Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About Swiggy Global Group:
Swiggy Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Global Group!
